revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:10世紀日本の人物]] [[ar:Category:أشخاص يابانيون في القرن 10]] [[es:Category:Japoneses del siglo X]] [[fa:Category:اهالی ژاپن در سده ۱۰ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Personnalité japonaise du Xe siècle]] [[it:Category:Giapponesi del X secolo]] [[ka:Category:X საუკუნის იაპონელები]] [[ko:Category:10세기 일본 사람]] [[ro:Category:Japonezi din secolul al X-lea]] [[sv:Category:Personer i Japan under 900-talet]] [[tr:Category:10. yüzyılda Japonlar]] [[vi:Category:Người Nhật thế kỷ 10]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Abe no Seimei]].

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6263890)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q6263890}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:10世紀日本の人物]] [[ar:Category:أشخاص يابانيون في القرن 10]] [[es:Category:Japoneses del siglo X]] [[fa:Category:اهالی ژاپن در سده ۱۰ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Personnalité japonaise du Xe siècle]] [[it:Category:Giapponesi del X secolo]] [[ka:Category:X საუკუნის იაპონელები]] [[ko:Category:10세기 일본 사람]] [[ro:Category:Japonezi din secolul al X-lea]] [[sv:Category:Personer i Japan under 900-talet]] [[tr:Category:10. yüzyılda Japonlar]] [[vi:Category:Người Nhật thế kỷ 10]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=10th-century_Japanese_people here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
